intro: Guess capital cities, flags & countries in a fun geography quiz!
description:
Worldly: the ultimate Countries & Geography Quiz!

Join Sir Maxwell Worldly on a grand adventure around the globe! Test your knowledge of countries, capitals, flags, maps, and more in the world geography quiz loved by explorers everywhere.

Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned traveller, Worldly makes learning geography fun, fast, and addictive. Play quick rounds to sharpen your knowledge, or dive deep into every country, capital, landmark, and currency on the planet.

Why players love Worldly:
• Guess every world capital and prove your geography skills.
• Learn every country flag in a fun, fast-paced quiz format.
• Explore currencies, landmarks, and regions across the planet.
• Challenge friends and prove you're the most seasoned traveller!
• 54 game modes spanning every corner of the globe.

With game modes covering capitals, countries, flags, maps, currencies, and geography trivia, there's always a new challenge to conquer. Earn achievements, beat your high score, and keep your mind sharp!

Stunning visuals & audio: Explore a beautiful hand-drawn globe as Sir Maxwell whisks you around the planet in his iconic hot air balloon. Enjoy gorgeous cartoon-style graphics and full animation from a BAFTA award-winning art team, plus an addictive soundtrack and sound effects.

Packed with content:
• Every country in the world, with national flags and local currencies.
• Capital cities, city locations, and detailed maps.
• Mini-games, multiple difficulty levels, and fast-paced quiz rounds.
• New quizzes and challenges added regularly — the journey never ends!

Perfect for:
• Students who want to learn world geography and capitals.
• Quiz and trivia fans who love testing their knowledge.
• Travellers curious about countries, flags, and cultures.
• Anyone who loves fun, educational, and challenging games.

Get Worldly today and start your adventure — how well do you really know our planet?
